column1: Luis Arraez stands out as the top pick, leading off for Colorado with a strong track record of consistency and a favorable park boost. He owns a high probability to record a hit and benefits from the platoon advantage against Ryan Feltner. Jake McCarthy also offers reliability atop the order with a similar park factor and lefty-on-righty edge. Heliot Ramos, Otto Lopez, and Xavier Edwards round out the list but come with slightly less dependable recent form.
